name.en: Peninsular Botanic Garden at Thung Khai
name.nl: Peninsular Botanic Garden bij Thung Khai

address: Thung Khai, Yan Ta Khao District, Trang Province
opening_hours: The official TAT attraction page describes the garden as a daytime nature stop and notes the canopy walkway within the botanic-garden grounds.

description.en: The easiest forest-side nature extension from Trang town, built around botanical diversity and a canopy walkway rather than a long overbuilt detour.
description.nl: De eenvoudigste natuuruitstap vanuit Trang, met botanische diversiteit en een canopy walkway in plaats van een lange omweg.

metaTitle.en: Peninsular Botanic Garden at Thung Khai | Trang | Go2Thailand
metaTitle.nl: Peninsular Botanic Garden bij Thung Khai | Trang | Go2Thailand

metaDescription.en: Why Thung Khai is Trang's strongest close-in forest and canopy-walk extension.
metaDescription.nl: Waarom Thung Khai de sterkste bos- en canopy-uitstap dicht bij Trang is.

enhanced_description:
Thung Khai is useful because it gives Trang a real nature stop close enough to town to stay practical. TAT's official attraction page still keeps the botanic garden visible for its canopy walkway and forest biodiversity, which is more valuable than stretching the itinerary with weak province-wide filler.

It works best as a half-day. The city still does most of the heavy lifting in Trang, but Thung Khai adds a genuine green counterpoint when the trip needs one nature block without losing the town itself.
detailed_history: The botanic garden functions as a conservation and interpretation site for peninsular plant life. TAT still treats it as one of Trang's recognizable close-in nature stops.
visitor_experience: Expect a shaded forest-side visit, canopy-level views, and a quieter pace than the province's sea routes. This is not an adrenaline attraction; it is a calmer biodiversity and walking stop.

practical_info.how_to_get_there: Best reached by car or arranged local transport from Trang town.
practical_info.nearby_attractions: Trang town breakfast and old-town blocks, or a separate Khao Chong-side nature stay.
practical_info.food_options: Eat in town before or after; this is not primarily a food stop.
practical_info.shopping: None of note beyond the attraction itself.

insider_tips: Use this when you want one calm forest block without sacrificing the city.
Morning is more comfortable than the hotter middle of the day.
Do not overbuild this into a full province-sweep.
verified_note: Source-backed summary based on the official Tourism Authority of Thailand attraction page for Peninsular Botanic Garden (Thung Khai).
cultural_significance: Thung Khai adds an environmental and educational layer to Trang that balances the city's breakfast culture and the sea side without overwhelming either.
